creator: scrappy@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Post port freeze, the interactive configuration stuff is going to be 
removed, leaving just the pkg-message to describe how to enable it. 

Other then the postfix port (that I'm aware of), no other port go 
through this sort of interactive installation, and, as Kris Kennedy 
points out, it breaks in sysinstall, or any other automated installation 
procedure ...
